{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Arelius tower
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Arelius tower]] has a blue flashing storm.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Arelius tower]] is made of white stone blocks held up by fluted columns.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
